item.title: One of my favorite things about having multiple cats is watching little moments like this 🐾 Cats usually only groom cats they fully trust, so this is actually a really sweet bonding behavior to see. #catsoftiktok #catbehavior #catmomlife #bondedcats #vivi
item.description: By @vivizoneandthecats: One of my favorite things about having multiple cats is watching little moments like this 🐾 Cats usually only groom cats they fully trust, so this is actually a really sweet bonding behavior to see. #catsoftiktok #catbehavior #catmomlife #bondedcats #vivi
